description: Style NoteKeep cool and dry while you work out in this lightweight tee. For the coolest outdoorsy style choose wildcraft - specially designed for active types who care about the high performance of their gear (but don't worry, you won't miss out on style either - the brand have easily fused form and function in their products).Product DetailsWhite T-shirt, round neck, short raglan sleeves, green mesh panels on front and back and rubber branding on front hemMaterials and Care100% polyesterMachine washDo not bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry cleanSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size SPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
